answers.answer: Hello! 👋 Welcome! I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you today? Feel free to ask me about pricing, accounts, features, support, or anything else!
Goodbye! 👋 It was great chatting with you. Feel free to come back anytime if you need help. Have a wonderful day!
You're very welcome! 😊 I'm happy I could help. Is there anything else you'd like to know?
I'm doing great, thank you for asking! 😊 I'm here and ready to help you with any questions you have.

answers.question: What is your company?
answers.answer: We are a forward-thinking company focused on delivering innovative AI solutions that help businesses automate and optimize their operations. Our platform uses local AI to keep your data private and secure.

answers.question: What are your business hours?
answers.answer: Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you. For general inquiries, we typically respond within 2 business hours. Live chat is always available on our platform.

answers.question: How much does your service cost?
answers.answer: Our pricing starts at $29/month for the Basic plan, $99/month for Professional, and $299/month for Enterprise. All plans include a 14-day free trial. Contact our sales team for custom enterprise quotes.

answers.question: How do I create an account?
answers.answer: Visit our website and click 'Sign Up'. Enter your email address, create a strong password, and verify your email. You'll have instant access to start using our platform with a free trial.

answers.question: What payment methods do you accept?
answers.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and wire transfers for enterprise accounts.

answers.question: Do you offer a free trial?
answers.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all Professional features. No credit card required to get started. Simply sign up and begin exploring immediately.

answers.question: How do I reset my password?
answers.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and we'll send you a secure reset link within 2 minutes. The link expires after 24 hours for security.

answers.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
answers.answer: You can cancel anytime from your Account Settings → Subscription tab. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period. We offer no penalties, no hidden fees, and prorated refunds where applicable.

answers.question: What features are included in each plan?
answers.answer:
Here's what each plan offers:

🔹 **Basic ($29/mo):** 10 projects, API access, email support
🔹 **Professional ($99/mo):** 100 projects, priority support, analytics dashboard, integrations
🔹 **Enterprise ($299/mo):** Unlimited projects, dedicated support, custom AI training, SSO, SLA guarantee

All plans include a 14-day free trial!

answers.question: How do I contact support?
answers.answer: You can reach our support team via: Email: support@company.com | Live Chat: Available on our website 24/7 | Phone: 1-800-COMPANY (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST) | Account Dashboard: Submit tickets directly from your account.

answers.question: How do you protect my data?
answers.answer: We take data security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We are SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and conduct regular third-party security audits. Your data is never sold or shared.

answers.question: Do you have an API?
answers.answer: Yes! Our REST API is available on all plans. Documentation is at docs.company.com/api. We support JSON, webhooks, and SDKs for Python, JavaScript, Ruby, and Go. Rate limits vary by plan.

answers.question: What is your refund policy?
answers.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all annual plans. For monthly plans, we provide prorated refunds for unused time if cancelled within 7 days of renewal. Contact support@company.com to request a refund.

answers.question: What are the system requirements?
answers.answer: Our web platform works on any modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). For the local AI feature, you need: Windows 10+/macOS 12+/Ubuntu 20+, 8GB RAM minimum (16GB recommended), 5GB free disk space for AI models.

answers.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
answers.answer: Go to Account Settings → Subscription → Change Plan. You can upgrade instantly and the price difference will be prorated automatically. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle to avoid service interruption.
